title: Market Comment How Long Will The Downturn Last
section_path: Market Comment How Long Will The Downturn Last
section_path_text: Market Comment How Long Will The Downturn Last
summary:
Main
By George Lagarias
Summary
Historically, Bear Markets last for a few months to a couple of years. The quicker tightening slows, or ends, the quicker we will see an end to volatility and the return of market bullishness. For the Fed It will take one of two conditions- whichever comes first.
